meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Scale SaaS
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale projects. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to deliver high-end SaaS apps at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck to scaling is manual boilerplate setup. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you standardize your architecture, automate infrastructure provisioning, and reduce setup time by 80%. When combined with Claude Code, you transform from a manual coder into a high-leverage software architect capable of shipping production-ready applications in hours.
content.intro:
You’re stuck in the 'Freelancer Trap': you spend more time configuring databases, auth flows, and CI/CD pipelines than actually building features. Every new client project feels like a fresh hell of dependency management and repetitive architectural decisions that kill your profit margins and burn your creative energy.

The shift happens when you stop building from scratch and start building from a foundation. The Antigravity project template isn't just code; it's a battle-tested blueprint that enforces architectural rigor. By integrating it with Claude Code, you effectively turn your terminal into an elite engineering team, allowing you to scale your output without sacrificing the professional quality your clients demand.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your project structure immediately. This step pulls the core template that ensures consistent directory layouts and environment configurations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity enterprise template with Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Auth.js pre-configured.

steps.title: Automate Domain Modeling
steps.description: Stop writing SQL migrations by hand. Define your schema, and let the template generate the Drizzle ORM models and API endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a User, Project, and Invoice schema with relational mapping and Zod validation schemas.

steps.title: Implement Role-Based Access Control
steps.description: Security is non-negotiable. Use the template's built-in middleware to enforce authorization across your API routes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure RBAC middleware to restrict access to /dashboard to 'admin' and 'editor' roles only.

steps.title: Bootstrap UI Components
steps.description: Use the template's design system to whip up functional interfaces that don't look like amateur hour.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive dashboard layout using the Antigravity UI library, including a sidebar, top nav, and data table.

steps.title: CI/CD & Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Ensure your project is production-ready by automating the deployment pipeline directly from the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and Vercel deployment.

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag in Claude Code to review proposed file changes before committing to complex template refactors.
Maintain a 'Custom Hooks' library in your Antigravity template to instantly inject client-specific business logic without rewriting boilerplate.
Use Claude Code's 'memory' feature to train the agent on your specific coding style and naming conventions across all client projects.
Never modify the core Antigravity template files directly; always extend them via decorators or strategy patterns to keep updates seamless.
Integrate automated integration tests into your template's CI/CD flow so you can refactor client code with absolute confidence.
content.next_steps: Review your generated project structure, run a local test build, and push your first boilerplate commit to a private GitHub repository to serve as your master template.
content.conversion_block: Stop building the same thing twice. Leverage the Antigravity project template to reclaim your time, increase your margins, and deliver enterprise-grade software consistently. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
